description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after Pikachu, a well-known character from the Pokémon franchise. The toy features a rounded yellow body with two large, upright ears tipped in black, and a pair of small, black eyes with white highlights that give it a lively expression. Its cheeks are circular and rosy red, and it has a small, smiling mouth. The arms are short and slightly extended forward, while the legs are stubby and positioned to support a standing posture. The back displays two brown horizontal stripes and a prominent, zigzag-shaped tail with a brown base. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of plush toys, and the overall design is simple yet highly recognizable.
description: A soft, yellow Pikachu stuffed toy with black-tipped ears, red cheeks, and a zigzag tail, featuring a cheerful expression and plush texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing Pikachu's face, red cheeks, black eyes, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, ear, and the full zigzag tail extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, brown stripes, and the base of the zigzag tail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, ear, and the zigzag tail from the opposite side.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with wide, open eyes, a small smiling mouth, and rosy cheeks. The overall look is inviting and happy.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly extended forward and legs apart, head facing forward and ears pointed upward.
